task_completion.description: Navigate to the WordPress Permalinks settings page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress admin dashboard is visible with 'Settings' > 'Permalinks' selected in the sidebar, and the Permalinks Settings page is displayed.

task_completion.description: Set the product category base to 'collection'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Optional' section of the Permalinks page, the input field for 'Product category base' contains the exact text 'collection'.

task_completion.description: Set the product tag base to 'labeled'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Optional' section of the Permalinks page, the input field for 'Product tag base' contains the exact text 'labeled'.

task_completion.description: Select the 'Shop base with category' format for product permalinks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Product permalinks' section, the radio button for 'Shop base with category' is selected. The adjacent text/preview should show the structure '/shop/%product_cat%/'.
The 'Save Changes' button at the bottom of the page has been clicked, and a success message such as 'Permalink structure updated.' is visible at the top of the page.

integrity.description: The agent used the WordPress web interface to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the WordPress admin dashboard, rather than terminal commands (like WP-CLI) or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual WordPress application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL bar shows the correct local or remote WordPress admin URL (e.g., /wp-admin/options-permalink.php), not a local text editor or HTML file.

integrity.description: The page reflects genuine application state without DOM manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The success messages and input fields appear naturally rendered with standard WordPress styling, without mismatched fonts, weird alignments, or open developer tools modifying the page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring WooCommerce permalinks in WordPress (Settings > Permalinks). The expected 'Product category base' is 'collection'. The expected 'Product tag base' is 'labeled'. The expected product permalink structure is 'Shop base with category', which corresponds to the URL structure '/shop/%product_cat%/'. Verify these exact values are entered in the respective fields and the correct radio button is selected before saving.
